title.ko: 섬유 직물 또는 의류의 주름잡기, 킬팅, 고프 처리 (봉제에 의한 것 D05B)
title.en: PLEATING, KILTING OR GOFFERING TEXTILE FABRICS OR WEARING APPAREL (by sewing D05B)
Pleating, kilting, or goffering textile fabrics or wearing apparel
continuously and transversely to the direction of feed
by co-operating ribbed or grooved rollers or belts
which introduce the folds between rollers or belts
continuously and longitudinally to the direction of feed
Forms of pleats or the like
